name: Syed Mahfuzur Rahman
about: Hi, I'm Syed Mahfuzur Rahman — a Flutter developer, passionate about building efficient, user-friendly applications and mentoring the next generation of engineers. I enjoy solving real-world problems through clean, maintainable code and modern development practices. Alongside teaching and research, I continuously explore new technologies to enhance both my work and my students' learning experience. When I’m not coding or in the classroom, you’ll likely find me enjoying a good cup of coffee and refining ideas for my next project.
footer: Built with care · © 2026 Syed Mahfuzur Rahman
